action.description:
Introduced by Senators Keyeski, L. Johnson, Habush Sinykin, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Hesselbein, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Roys, Smith, Spreitzer, Wall and Wirch;
